Document:
# Conflict Rule 1 ## Avoid random deathmatch (RDM).
[italic][color=yellow]Faction Conflict:[/color][/italic] - Faction conflict is allowed at all times, due to the RP reason of [color=red][bold]active war[/bold][/color].
- Any conflict is allowed with a [color=red][bold]proper, reasonable RP reason[/bold][/color]. A stolen magazine may be reasoning for a fistfight, but not a meatgrinder. -- Using metaknowledge (external knowledge) of companies and antagonists (ADS/Chimera/Asakim Etc.,) found in the [color=blue]Discord or Guidebook[/color] [color=green][bold]is allowed[/bold][/color]. For example, the [color=red]RedSail Corsairs[/color] may be [color=red][bold]Killed On Sight[/bold][/color] (per line 5) as they are known pirates. Although the [color=yellow]Viper Group[/color] requires escalation, as they do contracting, not pirate work.
- Combat escalation should be stated in local, shortband, or broadband chat/radio channels and must be [color=green]clearly declared[/color] to those involved. (ex. "It's over Jackson, die fucker!!" in local chat, or shortband)
- Escalation to combat immediately is allowed in select circumstances such as [color=blue]command bounties[/color], [color=red]confirmed pirates[/color], [color=yellow]chimera/ADC[/color], etc. -- Vessel crew is allowed to [color=red][bold]KOS[/bold][/color] anyone who hacks or breaks their locked doors under "Castle doctrine." -- Vessels entering a range of [color=yellow][bold]512 meters[/bold][/color] within an active combat zone [bold]do not[/bold] require escalation, and [color=red][bold]you can immediately fire upon them[/bold][/color], no matter the IFF.
